timeline.title: spec12 r7 grammar collapse after aggressive repair-row midtrain
spec12 seed probe exposed probe-path regression
spec12 r9 tiny seeded canary stayed near r6 instead of collapsing
spec12 r10 recovered tables but over-corrected away from decision trees
`r12` tiny seeded continuation improved exact/materialized but exposed renderability drift
`r13` broad boundary repair regressed all three layout families
`r14` start-only canary still failed, so pause rung-chasing and rethink the materializer
`r15` full-scene replay canary beat `r12` without fragment repairs
`r16` overfocused on one failed train case and regressed below `r15`
`r17` expanded prompt-surface whole-scene canary solved both visible and hidden probes

incidents.title: spec12 r7 grammar collapse after aggressive repair-row midtrain
spec12 seed probe exposed probe-path regression

legacy_specs.name: SVG Atoms
legacy_specs.note: Legacy raw-SVG line with an older probe regime. Keep it in the story, but keep it out of unified structured charts.

legacy_specs.name: Bootstrap Tokenizer Failure
legacy_specs.note: Representation failure case that taught the tokenizer/contract lesson before the structured scene DSL line stabilized.

legacy_specs.name: Scene DSL v2 Grammar
legacy_specs.note: Design/compiler bridge that informed later specs, but not a normal cache-backed training family.
